_meta.doc: jpcite MCP registry presence snapshot — Wave 45
_meta.generator: Wave 45 Smithery/Glama/PulseMCP + 23 platform re-verify post v0.4.0 manifest bump on main (HEAD b409c29e0). Anthropic registry v0.3.5 LIVE confirmed isLatest=true; PyPI v0.4.0 release.yml run 25705502469 queued on tag v0.4.0; live-state honest gap = manifests on main say 0.4.0 but PyPI still at 0.3.5 + Anthropic registry still at 0.3.5.
_meta.honest_gap: Wave 43.5 commit c853bf48a bumped pyproject + server.json to v0.4.0 on main. Tag v0.4.0 pushed. release.yml run 25705502469 is QUEUED on tag v0.4.0 since 2026-05-12T00:26:45Z but has not started the publish-pypi job yet. PyPI + Anthropic registry both still serve v0.3.5 as latest. mcp-registry-publish.yml will fire automatically once PyPI v0.4.0 lands (OIDC). No manual intervention required — purely awaiting GHA queue.

rollup.diff_vs_w43_5: v0.3.5 still LIVE on PyPI + Anthropic registry (unchanged from W43.5 final). v0.4.0 manifests landed on main (commit c853bf48a, HEAD b409c29e0), tag v0.4.0 pushed, release.yml run 25705502469 queued -> PyPI v0.4.0 LIVE pending. 6 new platforms probed in W45 (mcpgateway.dev / mcpcat.io / mcpworld.com / mcpverse.io / mcp.help / mcp-store.com / aimcp.info / mcpmarket.com / wong2 list / punkpeye-clients list) — 0 unlocked any new submit path; all 4 dead/blocked or out-of-scope. Glama 110h+ past 72h ETA on v0.3.4 + 29h on v0.3.5. PR #6192 still OPEN blocked on Glama listing.
rollup.v0_4_0_publish_chain_state: release.yml run 25705502469 QUEUED on tag v0.4.0 since 2026-05-12T00:26:45Z. Once publish-pypi succeeds, mcp-registry-publish.yml will auto-fire on OIDC and post v0.4.0 to Anthropic registry. Smithery webhook will re-fire on next push. Glama + PulseMCP will see v0.4.0 once Anthropic registry mirrors (subject to their own crawl cadence).
